Our core services

Only three things we do, and we do them well — WhatsApp chatbots, business automation and custom systems built around how you work.

WhatsApp Chatbots

Reply to 100 customers at once — automatically.

⚙️

Business Automation

Work that used to take hours now happens by itself.

🛠️

Custom Software

Systems built around how your business really works.

Real results from real businesses

Mini case studies from Kampala and beyond.

Clinic in Kampala reduced customer response time from 4 hours to instant — and increased bookings by 40%.

Restaurant in Kampala cut order errors by 90% with a WhatsApp bot — sales jumped 25%.

Retail shop automates stock alerts and freed two staff for sales — revenue grew 15%.

Have a project in mind?

Tell us your business problem. We'll tell you exactly what we'd build — free, no obligation.

Easy pricing
for serious people

Three simple tiers to help you get started without the guesswork.

Basic

From $199/month

  • • WhatsApp bot
  • • 1 custom workflow
  • • Email support

Standard

From $499/month

  • • Everything in Basic
  • • API integrations
  • • Monthly reports

Advanced

From $999/month

  • • All features
  • • Dedicated engineer
  • • 24/7 support
Get a Free WhatsApp Demo

Sound familiar?

Lots of businesses around Kampala and beyond are wasting hours and cash on issues that a simple system could fix once and for all.

📊

Still using spreadsheets?

You're spending hours every week entering data by hand — and one mistake costs you a client or your entire month's records.

💬

Losing customers to slow follow-ups?

A customer messages you at 9pm. Nobody replies until morning. By then they've already called your competitor.

👥

Paying staff to do repetitive work?

You have people doing the same tasks every single day — tasks that a well-built system could handle automatically, 24/7.

These things stack up fast. Here's how we sort them out. ↓

Get a Free WhatsApp Demo

How it works

From our first chat to the day your system is live — here's what working with our Kampala team actually feels like.

01
🔍

We understand your problem

We start with a free consultation — a real conversation about how your business actually works, where you're losing time, and what a solution needs to do.

⏱ Day 1 — Free, no commitment

02
⚙️

We build your custom system

No templates. We design and develop a platform built around your exact workflow — whether that's a management system, a booking platform, or a customer portal.

⏱ Week 1–3 — Depending on scope

03
🚀

We integrate AI so it runs itself

We embed AI agents that handle the repetitive work — customer follow-ups, data processing, reporting, and more. Your system gets smarter over time.

⏱ Week 3–4 — Launch ready

Ready to see it in action? It's free to try.

  • Local team that understands African business context

  • Fast delivery
  • Affordable compared to international agencies
